item.title: Jersey Mike’s Speed Run Challenge
item.description: One sandwich, one clock, and a finish you’ll want to see.

media:content.media:title: Jersey Mike’s Speed Run Challenge
media:content.media:description: One sandwich, one clock, and a finish you’ll want to see.

item.title: BBQ Beast vs The Hottest Sauce Ever
item.description: A BBQ food challenge with a bold sauce twist and plenty of flavor. Would you take a bite?

media:content.media:title: BBQ Beast vs The Hottest Sauce Ever
media:content.media:description: A BBQ food challenge with a bold sauce twist and plenty of flavor. Would you take a bite?

item.title: Meat Lovers, Can You Handle This?
item.description: Big meat, big pressure, and no excuses once the timer starts.

media:content.media:title: Meat Lovers, Can You Handle This?
media:content.media:description: Big meat, big pressure, and no excuses once the timer starts.

item.title: 15-Year Streak on the Line
item.description: A food challenge with a 15-year streak at stake. Let’s see if this undefeated run finally gets broken.

media:content.media:title: 15-Year Streak on the Line
media:content.media:description: A food challenge with a 15-year streak at stake. Let’s see if this undefeated run finally gets broken.

item.title: Can I Beat Big Poppa’s 10lb Chili Dog?
item.description: This plate gets heavy fast—wait for the finish.

item.title: $1000 Godzadilla Food Challenge
item.description: Stick around for the final bite—this one gets loud fast.

item.title: KC Finn’s $1000 Clock Is Ticking
item.description: A timed challenge with a $1000 payout on the line. One slip on the clock and the whole prize disappears.

media:content.media:title: KC Finn’s $1000 Clock Is Ticking
media:content.media:description: A timed challenge with a $1000 payout on the line. One slip on the clock and the whole prize disappears.

item.title: 2.5lb Spaghetti + Chili Challenge
item.description: Big plates like this always turn into a debate—would you take it on? A fun, flavorful challenge with spaghetti and chili.

media:content.media:title: 2.5lb Spaghetti + Chili Challenge
media:content.media:description: Big plates like this always turn into a debate—would you take it on? A fun, flavorful challenge with spaghetti and chili.
